title: Conville police search for missing 60 year old woman
description: GEORGE NEWS - Conville police is seeking the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Conville police is seeking the assistance of the public in the search for Spasiena Susanna Flanck (60) from Golf Street, Parkdene in George who was reported as missing by her next of kin.

Preliminary investigation into her disappearance reveals that she left her residence on Thursday, 28 November 2024 at about 06:30 to her place of work.


> She did not arrive at the business in the industrial area and also never returned home the evening.


Flanck was dressed in a green top, grey jacket with no sleeves and black pants at the time of her disappearance.

A search to trace the missing woman is underway.

The investigation officer, Warrant Officer Lee-Ann Geldenhuys, urges anyone with information on the whereabouts of Flanck to contact her at the Conville Detectives on 044 803 3301 or 084 464 6084, alternatively, Crime Stop at 08600 10111.

A search is underway to trace the wherabouts of Spasiena Susanna Flanck (60) who left work on Thursday at 6:30 and is still missing.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
